regions.text: In a story, Br’er Rabbit gets into a well-bucket and goes to the bottom. As he goes down, the empty bucket comes up.
Br’er Rabbit wonders how he will get back up. Then Br’er Fox comes along and asks what he is doing down there.
Br'er: Brother. (Illustrations show Br'er Rabbit trapped in the well and Br'er Fox looking down).
